prompt: Steady clock ticking with precise rhythmic clicks in close dry perspective, then exploding into a short powerful brass horn blast with wide stereo impact and immediate sforzando attack, 120 BPM tick tempo, used as a countdown-style news-to-sports radio transition.

council_notes.sfx-ear: Clock ticks at 120 BPM, sforzando brass; every element physically achievable
council_notes.sfx-director: Textbook news-to-sports: countdown=serious, brass=sports-punch, 120 BPM makes edit-friendly
council_notes.sfx-librarian: Clock ticking is novel source; countdown structure differs from sub-bass countdown in texture

prompt: Deep subsonic low-end rumble building from below the audible floor, slow shudder texture centered in the mix, then cutting into a loud electric guitar power chord with saturated distortion and wide stereo room fill, used as an ominous-to-energetic news-to-sports transition.

council_notes.sfx-ear: Rumble and guitar power chord well-specified; anchor rumble to specific low range for clarity
council_notes.sfx-director: Ominous-to-energetic arc works; distortion sits well for sports programming
council_notes.sfx-librarian: Subsonic rumble + electric guitar power chord is novel pairing; no similar entry exists

prompt: Quick newsroom pencil scratch on paper and paper shuffle, desk-close perspective, then assembling into a unified orchestral hit with full string section and brass ensemble in hall-wide stereo, used as a newsroom-to-sports radio transition.

prompt: Single deep church bell toll with long resonant decay in cathedral distance, solemn mid-low ring, then building into a stadium crowd explosion with roaring cheers and full-spectrum energy, wide arena spatial, used as a somber-to-celebratory news-to-sports radio transition.

council_notes.sfx-ear: Church bell toll and crowd explosion with cathedral-to-arena spatial arc; highly specific

prompt: Steady rain patter on a window pane with indoor room perspective, then transitioning into a clean electric guitar chord strum with live concert stage presence and crisp mid-range attack, used as a reflective-to-energetic news-to-sports transition.

council_notes.sfx-ear: Rain patter and electric guitar strum are physically achievable with clean transition
